description: anasinghe Arachchige Premasiri Ranasinghe Vs. Co-operative Development Commissioner North Western province and 10 Others before Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
parties: anasinghe Arachchige Premasiri Ranasinghe Vs. Co-operative Development Commissioner North Western province and 10 Others
judgement_by: Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
keywords: Revision application arising out an order made by a Provincial High Court in the exercise of Writ Jurisdiction-whether or not the 2nd Respondent-Co-operative Society is a cooperative society operating with State funds- whether or not a Co-operative Society in question should operate with State Funds at the time of the Registrar going to exercise the power so vested in him by section 60C of the Co-operative Societies Act No. 05 of 1972 as amended and not before or after.
legistation: Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Article 138-Article 154P(4)(b)-Section 60C of the Co-operative Societies Act No. 05 of 1972 as amended.
